summary: Explored the bot editor: it is RuleEditor.jsx (Editor tab), driven by useAppStore activeBotId and optional bulkEditIds. Loads bot via GET /api/bots/{id}, auto-saves rules with debounced PUT /api/bots/{id}/rules; bulk mode saves same rules to all selected IDs. UI layers include TrendConfig, RuleToolbar (line types + HISTORY/SIM), RuleLine with ConditionBuilder/ActionBuilder, StrategyAssistant, SnapshotSidebar. Backend bots router exposes bot CRUD and /available-variables for the condition picker.
current_status: No code changes. User has local modifications across backend rules/bots/settings and RuleEditor-related frontend files per git status; bot editor architecture is mapped for future tasks.
